proposedReply: We will check stock with the team. Our items ship from China and usually take 45-60 days by sea. What part are you looking for—engine, gearbox, or half-cut?
Our products ship from China by sea and usually take 45-60 days. To confirm the price and delivery timeframe, please provide your vehicle's year and VIN, or the specific engine code.

Thanks for your inquiry. To confirm the exact engine and gearbox you need and get pricing, please provide the vehicle's year and engine code or VIN. You can also check our transmission category here: https://asia-power.com/half-cuts/?part=transmission

Understood, you need an automatic gearbox. To find the correct part and pricing, please provide the year and engine code of your vehicle, or the VIN. You can also browse them here: https://asia-power.com/half-cuts/?part=transmission
We focus on mechanical parts like gearboxes, not transmission oil. For a gearbox, I would need your car's VIN or the year and engine code.
